issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1231: remaining Python asset sweep 1/10

branch.name: main
branch.latest_commit: tracked in git history after BIG-GO-1231 final sync

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero before BIG-GO-1231 changes, and repeated fast-forward contention on origin/main required pushing the lane to origin/big-go-1231.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
Lane commit 7790b8f4 and metadata commit 6fe091ef were created before the final sync update.
